name: Wagering Tax Exclusion via Separate Charging

eligibility.description: Available to businesses engaged in accepting wagers that explicitly break out the tax amount as a separate charge to the customer.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Excludes the amount of the excise tax from the taxable 'amount of wager' if the taxpayer establishes that the tax was collected as a separate charge from the person placing the wager.
